title: Principal Frontend Developer at Persistent Systems Consulting Pvt Ltd

jsonLd.title: Principal Frontend Developer at Persistent Systems Consulting Pvt Ltd
jsonLd.description:
Are you a skilled Frontend Developer looking for your next big career move? Persistent Systems Consulting Pvt Ltd in Howrah offers you the perfect platform to grow professionally and personally.

About Persistent Systems Consulting Pvt Ltd:
Persistent Systems Consulting Pvt Ltd is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Optimize application performance and ensure high availability
• Write and execute unit tests and integration tests
• Deploy and manage applications on cloud platforms like AWS, Azure, or GCP
• Design, develop and maintain scalable software applications
• Integrate third-party APIs and services
• Ensure code security and follow best practices for data protection
• Write clean, maintainable, and well-documented code

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• MBA from a recognized university
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Kubernetes
• Proficiency in React
• Proficiency in Python
• Proficiency in Go
• Proficiency in TypeScript
• Proficiency in Rust
• Proficiency in REST APIs
• Proficiency in AWS

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Annual performance appraisal
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Howrah, West Bengal, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Persistent Systems Consulting Pvt Ltd!
